data.title: Fidelity's new retirement plan lets you invest in crypto at no fee
data.description:
Fidelity Investments has launched a no-fee retirement plan for U. S. adults to invest in cryptocurrency in a tax-friendly manner.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/fidelitys-new-retirement-plan-lets-you-invest-in-crypto-at-no-fee

data.title: Fidelity Enables Direct Crypto Investments for Customers in New Retirement Plan
data.description:
The brokerage firm's clients have reportedly expressed interest in leveraging the tax advantages associated with trading and holding crypto.
source: https://www.nftgators.com/fidelity-enables-direct-crypto-investments-for-customers-in-new-retirement-plan/

data.title: He Yi: Binance is not suitable to issue an announcement without knowing about this legal dispute
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News He Yi responded to the controversy on the X platform: "Binance is not suitable to issue an announcement without knowing about this legal dispute. If users ask, Binance's standard response is: we are still contacting the project party for investigation and waiting for the other party's reply. 
I told my employees before that my judgment is based on my confidence in Binance's risk control on stablecoins, not based on the news from the project party. 
This world is a grass-roots team, there are not so many conspiracy theories. 
If there is such a panic next time, we announce: contacting the project party and waiting for the project party's reply, is it more in line with everyone's expectations?"

data.title: Bonk Surges 5% In A Day, Outpacing Dogecoin, Shiba Inu: What's Driving The Rally?
data.description:
Bonk (CRYPTO: BONK) is up 5% on Wednesday, with traders anticipating the rally to continue further.

data.title: Lawmaker alleges Trump wants to replace US dollar with his stablecoin
data.description:
California Representative Maxine Waters, ranking member of the US House Financial Services Committee, used her opening statement at a markup hearing to criticize President Donald Trump’s business and ethical entanglements with the crypto industry, including the launch of a stablecoin by a family-backed company. Addressing lawmakers at an April 2 hearing, Waters said Trump had used his position as president to leverage “multiple crypto schemes” for profit, including a US dollar-pegged stablecoin launched by World Liberty Financial (WLFI) — the firm backed by his family. The California lawmaker pointed to Trump’s memecoin launched in January, his plans to establish a national cryptocurrency stockpile, and “his own stablecoin,” referring to WLFI’s USD1 token launched in March. Rep
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/maxine-waters-donald-trump-replace-us-dollar-stablecoin?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Sun Yuchen Addresses First Digital Trust's Insolvency
data.description:
According to Odaily, Sun Yuchen recently commented on the X platform regarding the insolvency of First Digital Trust (FDT), stating that it is a factual observation devoid of emotional bias. He advised those connected with FDT to sever ties promptly to safeguard their assets. The consequences for its founder, Vincent Chok, due to alleged fraudulent activities, will be determined by the judicial system and regulatory authorities.

Sun Yuchen further emphasized that his remarks should not be over-interpreted, particularly by his closest partners. He expressed confidence in the trust built over the past decade through extensive collaborations worth billions of dollars, affirming that this trust remains unwavering.

data.title: Justin Sun: The consequences of FDT founder’s fraud will be determined by the judicial system and regulators
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Sun Yuchen posted on the X platform that First Digital Trust (FDT) is insolvent and is a statement of fact without any emotional color. If you have any relationship with them, please cut off the relationship as soon as possible to protect your assets. As for what consequences its founder Vincent Chok will face for his fraudulent behavior-this will be determined by the judicial system and regulators. Sun Yuchen added: "It is not recommended that anyone over-interpret my words, especially for my closest partners. I believe in them-our trust has been built over the past decade through long-term cooperation worth tens of billions of dollars. I firmly believe that this trust remains unwavering."

data.title: Jupiter acquires Solana ecosystem creator platform DRiP
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Jupiter has acquired Solana Ecosystem Creator Platform DRiP. The specific acquisition amount has not been disclosed. DRiP completed an $8 million seed round of financing in September last year, led by NFX, Coinbase Ventures and Progression (a fund founded by former TikTok executives). (SolanaFloor)

data.title: Bitcoin Investment Timing: Insights from Bitwise's Matt Hougan
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Matt Hougan, the chief investment officer at Bitwise, has provided a detailed analysis on the current investment landscape for Bitcoin (BTC). Hougan argues that, from a risk-adjusted perspective, there has never been a more favorable time to invest in Bitcoin. He highlights the transformation of Bitcoin from its early days, which were fraught with technology risks, regulatory threats, trading inefficiencies, and reputational concerns. Today, these risks have significantly diminished, paving the way for Bitcoin's integration into the global financial ecosystem.

Hougan points to several key developments that have contributed to Bitcoin's growing stability and acceptance. The introduction of Bitcoin ETFs, the adoption by major institutional investors, and even the strategic reserve of Bitcoin by the U.S. government have all played a role in solidifying its position. He notes that Bitcoin currently represents only 10% of gold's market value, suggesting that it has substantial room for growth. Hougan believes that matching gold's market value is merely a milestone in Bitcoin's long-term journey, implying a potential tenfold increase from its current valuation.

Furthermore, Hougan discusses Bitcoin's long-term price potential and the anticipated acceleration of institutional adoption. He emphasizes the structural long-term demand that is poised to enter the market, which is set against a backdrop of severely limited new supply. This dynamic, according to Hougan, could drive Bitcoin to unprecedented heights. His insights offer a compelling case for investors considering Bitcoin as a strategic asset in their portfolios.

data.title: CoinList returns to the US — and is hosting a token sale for DoubleZero
data.description:
After a five-year absence, CoinList is making a U. S. comeback and hosting its first token sale for DoubleZero Foundation.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/349308/coinlist-returns-the-u-s-token-sale-doublezero?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
